title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping strategy that achieved $1M ARR in 117 days and grew to $10M without external funding. The episode covers decision-making frameworks, product-led growth, SEO strategy, pricing experimentation, and customer retention tactics.
